item.title: 独家：SiPearl 向台湾 ODM 寻求帮助，将基于 Rhea 的服务器推向市场
item.summary: SiPearl has powered on and begun validating Rhea1, its first-generation server CPU designed in Europe. Its next challenge is convincing Taiwan's server manufacturers to turn the chip into systems that data centers can order and deploy.
